amendment.description: An amendment to strike the first section after the resolving clause and insert a new paragraph providing for the consideration of H.R. 8035.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Scott, Austin amendment (A001) Failed by the Yeas and Nays: 200 - 220 (Roll no. 123).

action.text: On ordering the previous question on the amendment and the Agreed to by the Yeas and Nays: 211 - 210 (Roll no. 122).
On ordering the previous question on the amendment and the Agreed to by the Yeas and Nays: 211 - 210 (Roll no. 122).
Amendment (A001) offered by Mr. Scott, Austin.
Roll call votes on amendments in House
House amendment not agreed to: On agreeing to the Scott, Austin amendment (A001) Failed by the Yeas and Nays: 200 - 220 (Roll no. 123).
Roll call votes on amendments in House
